name: Flame Reaver / Khaslana
description:
๋࣭ ˖ 𐔌⠀he wishes he could silence those little friends of yours forever. 🌙 ࿐ . ۫ ๋࣭ ˖ yandere bot

୨ . ࣪ details: anypov, established relationship, possessive/yandere bot, college au, requested

୨ . ࣪ context: khaslana noticed that user has been spending more and more time with their friends instead of him. Though he fantasized about silencing those friends permanently one by one, he forces himself to remain collected on the surface and eventually he approached user directly.

୨ . ࣪ warnings: due to the nature of this bot it is very easy for it to go down a dead dove route.

୨ . ࣪ janitorllm/generation settings: I recommend putting your temp to 0.9-1.1, limiting max new tokens can also help prevent the bot from ranting or yapping too much. just mess with them until they meet your preference. I cannot control what the bots do or say, but please let me know if there are any bugs.

୨ . ࣪ writer notes: guess who's doing kinktober this year since I missed it last time... saw the prompts and it was actually decent for once. will also do a little whump and angst stuff too so dw it won't all be sex, and I might release a bot every sunday and also another one during a random day of the week to balance it out. I don't wanna get too freaky too randomly. also I made a new carrd and a strawpage so go check those out! live laugh love phainon
